center.name: 約瑟夫·保羅·蓋馬爾
center.summary: 約瑟夫·保羅·蓋馬爾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括巴布亞蟆口鴟、Little shrikethrush、Dusky robin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Melanodryas vittata |volume=2022 |article-number=e.T22704840A211592401 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22704840A211592401.en |access-date=1 February 2026}} | genus = Melanodryas | species = vittata | authority = (Quoy & Gaimard, 1832) | synonyms = }} thumb|Juvenile The dusky robin (Melanodryas vittata) is a small passerine bird native to Tasmania

birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Colluricincla megarhyncha |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22705547A263746072 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22705547A263746072.en |access-date=16 January 2026}} | genus = Colluricincla | species = megarhyncha | authority = (Quoy & Gaimard, 1832) | synonyms = * Muscicapa megarhyncha * Myialestes megarhynchus * Myiolestes aruensis * Myiolestes megarhynchos * Pinarolestes megarhynchos * Pinarolestes megarhynchus }} The little shrikethrush or little shrike-thrush (Colluricincla megarhyncha) is a species of passerine bird in the family Pachycephalidae that is found in New Guinea as well as in north and east Australia

birds.evidence: The Papuan frogmouth (Podargus papuensis) is a species of bird in the family Podargidae, found in the Aru Islands, New Guinea, and in Cape York Peninsula, Queensland, Australia
